## Feature Summary

Describe the feature in one short paragraph.

## Problem / Use Case

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Scope

- Affected file type(s):
- UI area(s): (preview pane, context menu, parser, installer, etc.)
- Backward compatibility concerns:

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, sample files, or workflow details.
